faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Mano Verde
faq.supportDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our customer support team is here to help 24/7.

customers.title: For Customers
customers.q1: How do I place an order?
customers.a1: Simply download the Déliko app or visit our website, browse restaurants, select your dishes, and proceed to checkout. You can pay via MTN Mobile Money, Orange Money, or credit card.
customers.a2: Delivery time depends on the restaurant and distance. Typical delivery times range from 20-45 minutes. You can see the estimated delivery time before placing your order.

restaurants.title: For Restaurants
restaurants.q1: How do I become a restaurant partner?
restaurants.a1: Contact our restaurant partnerships team via the website or app. We'll evaluate your restaurant and discuss commission rates, terms, and integration requirements.
restaurants.q2: What commission does Mano Verde take?
restaurants.a2: Commission rates vary based on the restaurant type and location, typically ranging from 15-25%. We discuss custom rates with high-volume restaurants.

delivery.title: For Delivery Partners
delivery.q1: How do I become a delivery partner?
delivery.a1: Sign up through the app with a valid ID and proof of address. We verify your information and provide training. You'll need a reliable phone and vehicle (motorcycle, bicycle, or car).
delivery.a2: Your earnings depend on the number and distance of deliveries. Most delivery partners earn 15,000-40,000 XAF daily. You keep 85% of the delivery fee, and Mano Verde takes 15% commission.

general.title: General Questions
general.q1: What cities does Mano Verde operate in?
general.a1: We currently operate in Yaoundé, Douala, Bafoussam, Bamenda, Buea, Kumba, Bertoua, and Garoua. We're expanding to more cities regularly.
general.q2: How do I contact customer support?
general.a2: You can reach us via the app chat, email at infos@manovende.com, or phone. We respond within 2 hours during business hours.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.section1Content: By accessing and using Mano Verde, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
terms.section2ContentIntro: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Mano Verde for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
terms.section2Item2: Using the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display

terms.section2Item4: Removing any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials
terms.section2Item5: Transferring the materials to another person or "mirroring" the materials on any other server
terms.section3Content: The materials on Mano Verde are provided on an 'as is' basis. Mano Verde makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
terms.section4Content: In no event shall Mano Verde or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Mano Verde, even if Mano Verde or an authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.
terms.section5Content: The materials appearing on Mano Verde could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. Mano Verde does not warrant that any of the materials on Mano Verde are accurate, complete, or current. Mano Verde may make changes to the materials contained on Mano Verde at any time without notice.
terms.section6Content: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Cameroon, and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that location.
terms.ctaText: Agree to our terms and ready to start ordering?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we protect your data.
privacy.section1Content: Mano Verde ("Company", "we", "us", or "our") operates the manoverde.com website and the Mano Verde mobile application (the "Service"). This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our Service and the choices you have associated with that data.
privacy.section2ContentIntro: We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you.
privacy.section2Item1: Personal Data: Email address, first and last name, phone number, address, city, state, postal code, and cookies and similar tracking technologies
privacy.section2Item2: Usage Data: Information about how you access and use the Service, including IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on pages
privacy.section2Item3: Payment Data: Information necessary to process your payment, including credit card number and billing address
privacy.section2Item4: Location Data: GPS and other location-based information with your consent
privacy.section3ContentIntro: Mano Verde uses the collected data for various purposes:
privacy.section3Item1: To provide and maintain our Service
privacy.section3Item2: To notify you about changes to our Service
privacy.section3Item3: To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so
privacy.section3Item5: To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service
privacy.section4Content: The security of your data is important to us but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
privacy.section5Content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
privacy.section6ContentIntro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
privacy.section6Mail: By mail: Mano Verde Inc SA, Yaoundé, Cameroon
privacy.ctaText: We're committed to protecting your privacy. Start ordering with confidence.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Learn how we use cookies to enhance your experience
cookies.section1Content: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They help websites remember information about your visit, such as your preferred language and other settings. Cookies can be used to track your online activity. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the owners of the site.
cookies.section2ContentIntro: We use the following types of cookies on our website:
cookies.section2EssentialDesc: These cookies are necessary for the basic functions of the website and cannot be disabled. They help ensure site security and enable core functionality like login and payment processing.
cookies.section2PerformanceDesc: These cookies collect information about how visitors use our website, such as which pages are visited most often. The information is used to improve the website and optimize user experience.
cookies.section2FunctionalDesc: These cookies remember user preferences and choices, such as language preference, location, and login status, to provide a customized browsing experience.
cookies.section2MarketingDesc: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements. You can opt out of marketing cookies at any time.
cookies.section3Content: We work with third-party partners such as Google Analytics, payment processors, and advertising networks. These partners may also place cookies on your device. We do not control the cookies placed by third parties, and we encourage you to check their privacy policies to understand how they use your information.
cookies.section4ContentIntro: We use cookies for the following purposes:
cookies.section4Item1: To authenticate your identity and maintain your session
cookies.section4Item2: To remember your preferences and settings
cookies.section4Item3: To understand how you interact with our website
cookies.section4Item4: To improve our services and user experience
cookies.section4Item6: To prevent fraud and ensure security
cookies.section5ContentIntro: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through browser settings. You can:
cookies.section5Item1: View what cookies are set and delete them
cookies.section5Item2: Block all cookies or specific types of cookies
cookies.section5Item3: Accept cookies from some sites and block them from others
cookies.section5Item4: Clear all cookies when you close your browser
cookies.section5Note: Please note that blocking certain cookies may affect your ability to use some features of our website.
cookies.section6Content: In addition to cookies, we may use other similar technologies such as local storage, session storage, and pixel tags to store information on your device and track your online activities. These work similarly to cookies and you can control them through your browser settings.
cookies.ctaText: We respect your privacy. Browse our site with confidence.

about.title: About Déliko
about.subtitle: Connecting food lovers with the best restaurants in Cameroon, delivering exceptional culinary experiences to your doorstep
about.storyParagraph1: Déliko by Mano Verde Inc SA started with a simple vision: to make premium gastronomy accessible to everyone. Founded in Yaoundé, Cameroon, we recognized a gap in the food delivery market - customers wanted quality, restaurants wanted growth, and delivery partners wanted opportunity.
about.storyParagraph2: Today, we're proud to connect food enthusiasts with the finest 3 and 5-star restaurants across Cameroon. We've facilitated thousands of orders, partnered with hundreds of restaurants, and empowered hundreds of delivery drivers to earn a sustainable income.
about.missionDesc: To deliver excellence in food and service by connecting customers with premium restaurants, supporting entrepreneurs, and creating economic opportunities for our delivery partners.
about.visionDesc: To become the most trusted and efficient food delivery platform across Africa, known for supporting small businesses and building sustainable livelihoods.
about.valueExcellenceDesc: We maintain the highest standards of quality, service, and reliability.
about.valueFastDeliveryDesc: Your orders arrive quickly and fresh, every time.
about.valueLocalCommunityDesc: We support local restaurants and empower delivery partners to build their own businesses.
about.valueInnovationDesc: We continuously improve our platform to better serve all our stakeholders.
about.teamDesc: Our diverse team brings together technology experts, food enthusiasts, logistics professionals, and customer service specialists. We're united by a passion for excellence and a commitment to building something meaningful.
about.expansionDesc: We're rapidly expanding across Cameroon and planning to reach other African cities in 2026.
about.ctaDesc: Whether you're a customer hungry for great food, a restaurant ready to grow, or a delivery partner looking for opportunity - there's a place for you at Déliko.
